joke: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts.
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two tired.
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole-in-one.
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field.
Why did the man throw the clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly.
Why did the man run around his bed? He wanted to catch up on his sleep.
Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer? He just couldn't see himself doing it.
Why don't you trust stairs? They're always up to something.
Why did the man put his money in the freezer? He wanted cold hard cash.
Why did the computer get cold? It left its Windows open.
Why was the musician arrested? He was in treble.
Why was the belt arrested? It held up a pair of pants.
Why did the picture go to jail? It was framed.
Why don't cats play poker in the jungle? Too many cheetahs.
Why was the broom late? It overswept.
Why did the student bring a ladder to school? Because he wanted to go to high school.
Why did the stadium get hot after the game? All the fans left.
Why did the cellphone wear glasses? Because it lost its contacts.
Why did the doctor lose his patients? He had no patience.
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed space.
Why did the actor fall through the floorboards? He was just going through a stage.
